hero.title: Graph workflows for AI agents, in one native binary
hero.sub: NullBoiler decides what should run, when, and which worker executes it. Workflow graphs with checkpoints, fan-out, interrupts and replay — a static Zig binary with SQLite inside, dispatching to agents over six protocols.

alts.label: Build from source (Zig 0.16.0)
alts.code:
git clone https://github.com/nullclaw/nullboiler
cd nullboiler
zig build
./zig-out/bin/nullboiler --config config.json --port 8080 --db nullboiler.db

quickstart:
Start the orchestrator, hand it one task, watch the run move. No external database, no broker.

```bash
# start the orchestrator — one binary, SQLite inside
./zig-out/bin/nullboiler --config config.json --port 8080 --db nullboiler.db

# create a run: one task step, dispatched to workers tagged "coder"
curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/runs \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"input":{"goal":"summarize the repo"},"steps":[{"id":"step-1","type":"task","worker_tags":["coder"],"prompt_template":"{{input.goal}}"}]}'

# track progress; final output lands in steps[].output_json.output
curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8080/runs/<run_id>
```

features.title: Seven graph node types
features.body: task, agent, route, interrupt, send, transform and subgraph nodes, wired with directed edges and conditional route labels.

features.title: Checkpoints after every node
features.body: Replay a run from any checkpoint, fork it into a new run, set breakpoints with interrupt_before/after, or inject state mid-flight.

features.title: Fan-out with send
features.body: A send node maps an array in state across workers in parallel and gathers results under a configurable output key.

features.title: Six dispatch protocols
features.body: webhook, api_chat, openai_chat and A2A over HTTP, plus async MQTT and Redis Streams — heterogeneous workers in one config.

features.title: Pull mode against NullTickets
features.body: Polls the tracker, claims tasks by role, heartbeats leases, detects stalls, and manages per-task workspaces with shell hooks.

features.title: Observability included
features.body: Prometheus /metrics with live-state gauges, Grafana dashboards, AlertManager rules and an OpenAPI 3.1 spec ship in the repo.

note: Pre-1.0 with CalVer releases: config and CLI may change between releases.
